channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Afghan Taliban hold first closed-door talks with EU on deportations
item.description: Rights groups criticized the meeting, saying it undermines the EU's human rights obligations.

item.title: Revolutionary War soldier's DNA links him to living relatives
item.description: Continental Army soldier John Pumphrey enlisted as a teenager in 1777 and fought in key battles before dying in action against the British.

item.title: US temporarily lifts Iran oil sanctions amid peace talks; judge blocks SAVE voter tool
item.description: The US has temporarily lifted oil sanctions on Iran as peace talks continue. A federal judge also ruled the Trump administration's data system unlawful.

item.title: Who would fund Trump's proposed $300 billion Iran reconstruction plan?
item.description: The source of funding for a proposed $300 billion reconstruction plan for Iran remains unclear. Former National Security Adviser Jake Sullivan questioned the feasibility.
